Best Practice.description: Most critical determinant of open rate. Use the Subject Line Wizard GPT for creation and validation. Lines combining a business outcome with urgency consistently outperform curiosity-only lines. Wins: "Final Days Before Prime Day" beats "Something Big Is Coming"

Best Practice.title: Preview Text
Best Practice.description: 35 - 90 characters. Must extend the subject line — never repeat it . Use action verbs and reference subscriber benefit. If left blank, email clients pull the first line of body, which often looks broken.

Best Practice.title: Email Copy — Promotional
Best Practice.description: ◆ 125 - 200 words max for service-based emails ◆ Structure: Problem → Impact → Solution → Proof → CTA ◆ Lead with problem or opportunity, not the service name ◆ Short sentences. Active voice. No jargon. Wins: "Finding Profitable Products Shouldn't Take Months" beats "We Offer Product Hunting Services"

Best Practice.title: CTA Best Practices
Best Practice.description: ✓ One primary CTA per email only ✓ Min 44×44px for mobile tappability (W3C/WCAG) ✓ Use styled buttons — outperform hyperlinked text ✕ Never use "Click Here" — fails accessibility & spam filters Wins: "Book A Free Consultation" consistently beats "Learn More"

Best Practice.title: Design Standards
Best Practice.description: ◆ Banner: 600×650px · Hero: 200 - 300px height ◆ 3 - 4 images per email (vectors, stock, GIFs) ◆ Alt text required on every image ◆ Mobile-first (375 - 390px). Test on Outlook, Gmail, iOS Mail ◆ Web-safe fonts only: Arial, Helvetica, Tahoma, Times New Roman ◆ CTA buttons: white text on #F36B31 or dark background ◆ Min 20px padding between sections

Best Practice.title: Deliverability Rules
Best Practice.description: ✓ SPF, DKIM, DMARC configured on sending domain ✓ Always send from spctek.com — never free email domains ✓ Min 60% text to 40% image ratio ✓ Physical address in every email footer (CAN-SPAM) ✕ No URL shorteners (bit.ly, tinyurl) — flagged by spam filters ✕ No ALL CAPS in subjects or body ✕ No spam trigger words: FREE, GUARANTEED, ACT NOW, 100% FREE

KPI.title: Open Rate
KPI.description: Industry benchmark: 25% - 41%.

KPI.title: Click Through Rate
KPI.description: Industry benchmark: 2.5% - 3.5% avg.

KPI.title: List Growth Rate
KPI.description: Industry benchmark: 1% - 3% monthly.

KPI.title: CTOR
KPI.description: Industry benchmark: 10% - 20%.

KPI.title: Deliverability Rate
KPI.description: Industry benchmark: 95% - 99%.

KPI.title: Unsubscribe Rate
KPI.description: Industry benchmark: Below 0.2% - 0.5%.

KPI.title: Bounce Rate
KPI.description: Industry benchmark: Below 2%.

KPI.title: Spam Complaint Rate
KPI.description: Industry benchmark: Below 0.1%.

SOP.title: Quora Community Outreach SOP
SOP.description: Platform-specific community management procedure for Quora.

steps.step_description: Search for questions using keywords relevant to your product/industry. Use Quora Spaces and main search bar.
Prioritise questions with 500+ followers or recent activity (last 30 days).
Write a thorough answer ( 300 - 600 words ). Use examples, data, or personal experience.
Mention company/product only at the end if it directly solves the question. Format: "Disclosure: I work at [Company]. We built [X] to solve exactly this…"
Follow up — check back in 48 hrs ; respond to comments on your answer.

SOP.title: Reddit Community Outreach SOP
SOP.description: Platform-specific community management procedure for Reddit.

steps.step_description: Identify 5 - 10 relevant subreddits . Read the rules of each before posting anything — many ban self-promotion outright.

steps.step_title: First 2 weeks: only comment helpfully, never promote.
steps.step_description: Build karma organically.

steps.step_title: When mentioning your company, be transparent
steps.step_description: "I'm part of the team at [X]..."
— Reddit hates duplicate questions.
Monitor subreddits for brand/competitor mentions using Reddit search or F5Bot .

SOP.title: Facebook Groups Community Outreach SOP
SOP.description: Platform-specific community management procedure for Facebook Groups.

steps.step_description: Join 8 - 15 groups in your niche. Request membership and answer admin questions honestly.
Understand the culture and what content gets engagement.
Engage with existing posts before posting your own — like, comment, add value first.
ask questions or share useful resources. ✔ "Here's a free template for [pain point] — hope it helps!" ✘ "Check out our tool → link"
Respond to every comment on your posts within 24 hours .

SOP.title: LinkedIn Groups Community Outreach SOP
SOP.description: Platform-specific community management procedure for LinkedIn Groups.

steps.step_description: Join 5 - 8 active LinkedIn groups . Check last post date — avoid dead groups.
Start by commenting on existing discussions with substantive insights (not just "Great post!").
Post thought leadership: industry observations, lessons learned, data. Keep posts 150 - 300 words . End with a question.
Connect with engaged members after genuine conversation — not before.
If sharing company content, add your own perspective — don't just repost the link.

Best Practice.title: Lead with value.
Best Practice.description: Lead with value. Answer first — mention us only if genuinely relevant.

Best Practice.title: Never copy-paste the same reply across multiple threads — always personalise.
Best Practice.description: Never copy-paste the same reply across multiple threads — always personalise.

Best Practice.title: Use your real name and a complete profile.
Best Practice.description: Use your real name and a complete profile. No fake or anonymous accounts.

Best Practice.title: Disclose affiliation when relevant: "I work at [Company] and we've seen this too…"
Best Practice.description: Disclose affiliation when relevant: "I work at [Company] and we've seen this too…"

Best Practice.title: If unsure whether to post — don't.
Best Practice.description: If unsure whether to post — don't. Ask your manager first.

Best Practice.title: Log every outreach action in the tracking sheet the same day.
Best Practice.description: Log every outreach action in the tracking sheet the same day.
